title: Cryptosepalum ambamense
taxonomy: Cryptosepalum ambamense is a species of plant in the family Leguminosae. It is a member of the genus Cryptosepalum, which is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Africa. The Leguminosae family, also known as Fabaceae, consists of plants that produce fruit pods and flowers with five petals. The classification of Cryptosepalum ambamense is further defined by its unique characteristics and geographical distribution. As a result, its classification is used for identification and research purposes in botany.
